variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16455 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16455 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16455 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P613334 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16455
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Replacement Filters? Replacement filters for Fleetguard Optiair Air Cleaners deliver superior performance and proven protection. • High-efficiency cellulose media is a proven performer across a wide range of heavy-duty diesel engine applications. • Unique sawtooth design compresses to cushion and hold the filter in place, providing a secure seal – even in severe environments. • RadialSeal™ design allows for fast filter changes. • Durable structural support protects filters from damage or collapse in heavy vibration applications or humid conditions.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25962 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16455
variants.description: Fleetguard® OptiAir™ AF25962 primary air element addresses key design requirements of all equipment manufacturers while outperforming conventional radial seal designs. Resulting in extended service intervals, reduced downtime, and lower maintenance costs.
